title: The one who scratched it
premise: Chain payoff: you learn how the message ended.

stages.narration: You almost miss it, back near where you started: a woman slumped against the transit shelter, a child's backpack still looped over one shoulder, a chapel service leaflet folded in her coat. DELACROIX, the leaflet says, in the same careful hand. She waited in the wrong place, and she waited too long.

choices.label: Do what you can — cover her, mark the spot

effects.note: buried Delacroix at the transit plaza

choices.label: She has no more use for what she's carrying
Say a word and leave her be

notes: Resolves the chain a day later; burying the dead preserves Humanity (GDD), robbing her erodes it.
